games.name: BARK
games.tagline: ONE BIG MAP, ONE SMALL COMMUNITY
games.shortDesc: One big map, one small community. Enter Bark — a world of the Treelatves. Hang out with others, play at the arcade, and enjoy the world of Bark!
games.fullDesc: Enter Bark, a world of the Treelatves. In Bark, you hang out with others, play at the new arcade, and enjoy the world of Bark!

reviews.author: StarProgramPillow
reviews.text: Really good game! Can't wait for the rat DLC!

reviews.author: llamaboi1
reviews.text: This game is so amazing 👍 if you don't like this, you're a stinky head
